CREATE TABLE mysch.articles (id INT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT);
COMMENT ON INDEX mysch.article_id IS 'Unique index on article ID';
COMMENT ON INDEX mysch.article_id IS NULL;
COMMENT ON INDEX mysch.article_id IS 'Index to enforce uniqueness';
COMMENT ON INDEX mysch.article_id IS 'Index for faster lookups';
COMMENT ON INDEX tmp.temp_idx IS 'Index on temp_table';
CREATE TABLE mysch.authors (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT);
COMMENT ON INDEX mysch.author_name IS 'Index for searching authors by name';
COMMENT ON INDEX mysch.author_name IS NULL;
COMMENT ON INDEX mysch.author_name IS 'Overridden comment for author index';
CREATE INDEX multi_column_idx ON mysch.articles (id, title);
COMMENT ON INDEX mysch.multi_column_idx IS 'Composite index on id and title';
COMMENT ON INDEX mysch.multi_column_idx IS 'Used for searching articles';
